chunks.text: Technical Reports - Peter Bartlett. Analysis of Hidden Markov Models and Support Vector Machines in Financial Applications (EECS-2010-63) by Satish Rao and Jerry Hong. A Unifying View of Multiple Kernel Learning (EECS-2010-49) by Marius Kloft, Ulrich RÃ¼ckert and Peter Bartlett. Matrix regularization techniques for online multitask learning (EECS-2008-138) by Alekh Agarwal, Alexander Rakhlin and Peter Bartlett. Optimal Strategies and Minimax Lower Bounds for Online Convex Games (EECS-2008-19) by Jacob Duncan Abernethy, Peter Bartlett, Alexander Rakhlin and Ambuj Tewari.
chunks.question: What are some technical reports by Peter Bartlett from 2008 to 2010?
chunks.answer: Matrix regularization and online convex games reports.

chunks.text: Closing the Gap between Bandit and Full-Information Online Optimization: High-Probability Regret Bound (EECS-2007-109) by Alexander Rakhlin, Ambuj Tewari and Peter Bartlett. Shifting: One-Inclusion Mistake Bounds and Sample Compression (EECS-2007-86) by Benjamin I. P. Rubinstein, Peter Bartlett and J. Hyam Rubinstein. Adaptive Online Gradient Descent (EECS-2007-82) by Peter Bartlett, Elad Hazan and Alexander Rakhlin. Multitask Learning with Expert Advice (EECS-2007-20) by Jacob Duncan Abernethy, Peter Bartlett and Alexander Rakhlin.
chunks.question: What technical reports did Peter Bartlett co-author in 2007?
chunks.answer: Online optimization, shifting, gradient descent reports.

chunks.text: Learning the Kernel Matrix with Semi-Definite Programming (CSD-02-1206) by Gert R. G. Lanckriet, Nello Cristianini, Peter Bartlett, Laurent El Ghaoui and Michael I. Jordan.
chunks.question: What is the 2002 technical report by Peter Bartlett about?
chunks.answer: Learning kernel matrix with semi-definite programming.
